signals.headline: Bank of Korea Holds Rate at 2
signals.raw:
Bank of Korea Holds Rate at 2.5% Despite Inflation Above Target | NO | HIGH confidence**

The Bank of Korea's Monetary Policy Board decided on Friday to keep its benchmark interest rate unchanged at 2.5% for the 7th consecutive month, maintaining a unanimous decision despite South Korea's annual inflation rising to 2.2% in March 2026—above the central bank's 2% target.[1][4]

This rate hold was wi
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?
